targets.rawSql:
WITH time_series AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as timestamp
),
top_stocks AS (
  SELECT s.symbol, s.market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC) as rn
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  LIMIT 5
),
stock_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    ts.timestamp,
    s.symbol,
    100 + (RANDOM() * 200) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts.timestamp) / 3600 + s.rn) * 20 + s.rn * 10 as price
  FROM time_series ts
  CROSS JOIN top_stocks s
)
SELECT 
  timestamp as time,
  symbol,
  price as value
FROM stock_prices
ORDER BY timestamp, symbol

WITH time_series AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as timestamp
),
top_crypto AS (
  SELECT c.symbol, c.market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.market_cap DESC) as rn
  FROM market_data.cryptocurrencies c
  WHERE c.market_cap > 1000000
  LIMIT 10
),
crypto_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    ts.timestamp,
    c.symbol,
    0.1 + (RANDOM() * 0.8) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts.timestamp) / 3600 + c.rn * 0.5) * 0.1 + c.rn * 0.05 as price
  FROM time_series ts
  CROSS JOIN top_crypto c
)
SELECT 
  timestamp as time,
  symbol,
  price as value
FROM crypto_prices
WHERE price <= 1.0
ORDER BY timestamp, symbol

WITH time_series AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as timestamp
),
top_forex AS (
  SELECT fp.symbol, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY fp.is_major DESC, fp.id) as rn
  FROM market_data.forex_pairs fp
  WHERE fp.is_major = true
  LIMIT 5
),
forex_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    ts.timestamp,
    f.symbol,
    1.0 + (RANDOM() * 0.5) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts.timestamp) / 7200 + f.rn * 0.3) * 0.02 + f.rn * 0.1 as rate
  FROM time_series ts
  CROSS JOIN top_forex f
)
SELECT 
  timestamp as time,
  symbol,
  rate as value
FROM forex_prices
ORDER BY timestamp, symbol

WITH time_series AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as timestamp
),
top_commodities AS (
  SELECT cm.symbol, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cm.id) as rn
  FROM market_data.commodities cm
  LIMIT 5
),
commodity_prices AS (
  SELECT 
    ts.timestamp,
    c.symbol,
    50 + (RANDOM() * 100) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts.timestamp) / 5400 + c.rn * 0.4) * 10 + c.rn * 5 as price
  FROM time_series ts
  CROSS JOIN top_commodities c
)
SELECT 
  timestamp as time,
  symbol,
  price as value
FROM commodity_prices
ORDER BY timestamp, symbol

WITH stock_data AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name as name,
    100 + (RANDOM() * 200) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 1000000)::bigint as volume,
    (-5 + (RANDOM() * 15)) as change_percent,
    ROUND((s.market_cap / 1000000000)::numeric, 1) as market_cap_billions
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND(current_price::numeric, 2) as current_price,
  volume,
  ROUND(change_percent::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  market_cap_billions
FROM stock_data
ORDER BY market_cap_billions DESC

WITH crypto_data AS (
  SELECT 
    c.symbol,
    c.name,
    0.1 + (RANDOM() * 0.8) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 5000000)::bigint as volume,
    (-15 + (RANDOM() * 40)) as change_percent,
    ROUND((c.market_cap / 1000000000)::numeric, 1) as market_cap_billions
  FROM market_data.cryptocurrencies c
  WHERE c.market_cap > 1000000
  ORDER BY c.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND(current_price::numeric, 6) as current_price,
  volume,
  ROUND(change_percent::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  market_cap_billions
FROM crypto_data
WHERE current_price <= 1.0
ORDER BY market_cap_billions DESC

WITH forex_data AS (
  SELECT 
    fp.symbol,
    CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency) as pair,
    1.0 + (RANDOM() * 0.5) as current_rate,
    (RANDOM() * 10000000)::bigint as volume,
    (-2 + (RANDOM() * 5)) as change_percent,
    CASE WHEN fp.is_major THEN 'Major' ELSE 'Minor' END as pair_type
  FROM market_data.forex_pairs fp
  ORDER BY fp.is_major DESC, fp.id
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  pair,
  ROUND(current_rate::numeric, 6) as current_rate,
  volume,
  ROUND(change_percent::numeric, 4) as change_percent,
  pair_type
FROM forex_data
ORDER BY pair_type DESC

WITH commodity_data AS (
  SELECT 
    cm.symbol,
    cm.name,
    50 + (RANDOM() * 100) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 500000)::bigint as volume,
    (-8 + (RANDOM() * 20)) as change_percent,
    cm.asset_class
  FROM market_data.commodities cm
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND(current_price::numeric, 2) as current_price,
  volume,
  ROUND(change_percent::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  asset_class
FROM commodity_data
ORDER BY current_price DESC

WITH stocks_data AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name as name,
    'stock' as asset_type,
    100 + (RANDOM() * 200) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 1000000)::bigint as current_volume,
    90 + (RANDOM() * 180) as previous_price,
    (-10 + (RANDOM() * 25)) as change_percent
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 5000000000
  ORDER BY RANDOM()
  LIMIT 15
),
crypto_data AS (
  SELECT 
    c.symbol,
    c.name,
    'crypto' as asset_type,
    0.1 + (RANDOM() * 5) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 5000000)::bigint as current_volume,
    0.1 + (RANDOM() * 4.5) as previous_price,
    (-20 + (RANDOM() * 50)) as change_percent
  FROM market_data.cryptocurrencies c
  WHERE c.market_cap > 10000000
  ORDER BY RANDOM()
  LIMIT 15
),
forex_data AS (
  SELECT 
    fp.symbol,
    CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency) as name,
    'forex' as asset_type,
    1.0 + (RANDOM() * 0.5) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 10000000)::bigint as current_volume,
    1.0 + (RANDOM() * 0.45) as previous_price,
    (-3 + (RANDOM() * 8)) as change_percent
  FROM market_data.forex_pairs fp
  WHERE fp.is_major = true
  ORDER BY RANDOM()
  LIMIT 10
),
commodity_data AS (
  SELECT 
    cm.symbol,
    cm.name,
    'commodity' as asset_type,
    50 + (RANDOM() * 100) as current_price,
    (RANDOM() * 500000)::bigint as current_volume,
    45 + (RANDOM() * 95) as previous_price,
    (-12 + (RANDOM() * 30)) as change_percent
  FROM market_data.commodities cm
  ORDER BY RANDOM()
  LIMIT 10
),
all_movers AS (
  SELECT * FROM stocks_data
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM crypto_data
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM forex_data
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM commodity_data
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  asset_type,
  ROUND(current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  current_volume,
  ROUND(previous_price::numeric, 4) as previous_price,
  ROUND(change_percent::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  NOW() as timestamp
FROM all_movers
ORDER BY ABS(change_percent) DESC
LIMIT 50

WITH volume_data AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as time_hour,
    'stock' as asset_type,
    (RANDOM() * 50000000 + 100000000)::bigint as volume
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as time_hour,
    'crypto' as asset_type,
    (RANDOM() * 20000000 + 50000000)::bigint as volume
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as time_hour,
    'forex' as asset_type,
    (RANDOM() * 30000000 + 200000000)::bigint as volume
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as time_hour,
    'commodity' as asset_type,
    (RANDOM() * 10000000 + 20000000)::bigint as volume
)
SELECT 
  time_hour as time,
  asset_type as metric,
  volume as value
FROM volume_data
ORDER BY time_hour

WITH economic_data AS (
  SELECT indicator, timeframe, value FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('CPI Inflation YoY', '1mo', 1.5 + (RANDOM() * 2.5)),
    ('CPI Inflation YoY', '6mo', 2.0 + (RANDOM() * 3.0)),
    ('CPI Inflation YoY', '12mo', 2.2 + (RANDOM() * 3.3)),
    ('CPI Inflation YoY', '3y', 2.5 + (RANDOM() * 3.5)),
    ('CPI Inflation YoY', '5y', 2.8 + (RANDOM() * 3.7)),
    ('CPI Inflation YoY', '10y', 3.0 + (RANDOM() * 4.0)),
    
    ('Fed Funds Level', '1mo', 0.5 + (RANDOM() * 5.5)),
    ('Fed Funds Level', '6mo', 1.0 + (RANDOM() * 5.0)),
    ('Fed Funds Level', '12mo', 1.5 + (RANDOM() * 4.5)),
    ('Fed Funds Level', '3y', 2.0 + (RANDOM() * 4.0)),
    ('Fed Funds Level', '5y', 2.5 + (RANDOM() * 3.5)),
    ('Fed Funds Level', '10y', 3.0 + (RANDOM() * 3.0)),
    
    ('Fed Funds Real', '1mo', -0.5 + (RANDOM() * 4.5)),
    ('Fed Funds Real', '6mo', 0.0 + (RANDOM() * 4.0)),
    ('Fed Funds Real', '12mo', 0.3 + (RANDOM() * 3.7)),
    ('Fed Funds Real', '3y', 0.5 + (RANDOM() * 3.5)),
    ('Fed Funds Real', '5y', 0.8 + (RANDOM() * 3.2)),
    ('Fed Funds Real', '10y', 1.0 + (RANDOM() * 3.0)),
    
    ('GDP Growth YoY', '1mo', 0.0 + (RANDOM() * 5.0)),
    ('GDP Growth YoY', '6mo', 0.5 + (RANDOM() * 4.5)),
    ('GDP Growth YoY', '12mo', 1.0 + (RANDOM() * 4.0)),
    ('GDP Growth YoY', '3y', 1.5 + (RANDOM() * 3.5)),
    ('GDP Growth YoY', '5y', 2.0 + (RANDOM() * 3.0)),
    ('GDP Growth YoY', '10y', 2.2 + (RANDOM() * 2.8)),
    
    ('Unemployment U-3', '1mo', 2.0 + (RANDOM() * 5.0)),
    ('Unemployment U-3', '6mo', 2.5 + (RANDOM() * 4.5)),
    ('Unemployment U-3', '12mo', 3.0 + (RANDOM() * 4.0)),
    ('Unemployment U-3', '3y', 3.2 + (RANDOM() * 3.8)),
    ('Unemployment U-3', '5y', 3.5 + (RANDOM() * 3.5)),
    ('Unemployment U-3', '10y', 3.8 + (RANDOM() * 3.2))
  ) AS t(indicator, timeframe, value)
)
SELECT 
  indicator,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN timeframe = '1mo' THEN value END)::numeric, 2) as value_1m,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN timeframe = '6mo' THEN value END)::numeric, 2) as value_6m,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN timeframe = '12mo' THEN value END)::numeric, 2) as value_12m,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN timeframe = '3y' THEN value END)::numeric, 2) as value_3y,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN timeframe = '5y' THEN value END)::numeric, 2) as value_5y,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN timeframe = '10y' THEN value END)::numeric, 2) as value_10y
FROM economic_data
GROUP BY indicator
ORDER BY indicator

WITH return_periods AS (
  SELECT 'stock' as asset_type, ROUND((-3 + (RANDOM() * 10))::numeric, 2) as return_1m, ROUND((-5 + (RANDOM() * 25))::numeric, 2) as return_6m, ROUND((-8 + (RANDOM() * 40))::numeric, 2) as return_12m
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'crypto', ROUND((-15 + (RANDOM() * 50))::numeric, 2), ROUND((-30 + (RANDOM() * 120))::numeric, 2), ROUND((-50 + (RANDOM() * 200))::numeric, 2)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'forex', ROUND((-2 + (RANDOM() * 6))::numeric, 2), ROUND((-5 + (RANDOM() * 15))::numeric, 2), ROUND((-8 + (RANDOM() * 25))::numeric, 2)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'commodity', ROUND((-5 + (RANDOM() * 15))::numeric, 2), ROUND((-10 + (RANDOM() * 30))::numeric, 2), ROUND((-15 + (RANDOM() * 50))::numeric, 2)
)
SELECT 
  asset_type,
  return_1m,
  return_6m,
  return_12m
FROM return_periods
ORDER BY asset_type

WITH stock_returns AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    COALESCE(s.company_name, s.symbol) as name,
    (-2 + (RANDOM() * 8)) as return_rate,
    (50 + (RANDOM() * 100)) as volume_millions
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND(return_rate::numeric, 2) as return_rate,
  ROUND(volume_millions::numeric, 0) as volume_millions
FROM stock_returns
ORDER BY return_rate DESC

WITH crypto_returns AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('BTC', 'Bitcoin'),
    ('ETH', 'Ethereum'),
    ('ADA', 'Cardano'),
    ('SOL', 'Solana'),
    ('MATIC', 'Polygon'),
    ('DOT', 'Polkadot'),
    ('AVAX', 'Avalanche'),
    ('ALGO', 'Algorand'),
    ('ATOM', 'Cosmos'),
    ('FTM', 'Fantom')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-15 + (RANDOM() * 50))::numeric, 2) as return_1m,
  ROUND((-30 + (RANDOM() * 120))::numeric, 2) as return_6m,
  ROUND((-50 + (RANDOM() * 200))::numeric, 2) as return_12m
FROM crypto_returns
ORDER BY return_12m DESC

WITH crypto_risk AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('BTC', 'Bitcoin'),
    ('ETH', 'Ethereum'),
    ('ADA', 'Cardano'),
    ('SOL', 'Solana'),
    ('MATIC', 'Polygon'),
    ('DOT', 'Polkadot'),
    ('AVAX', 'Avalanche'),
    ('ALGO', 'Algorand'),
    ('ATOM', 'Cosmos'),
    ('FTM', 'Fantom')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-15 - (RANDOM() * 10))::numeric, 3) as var_5,
  ROUND((10 + (RANDOM() * 15))::numeric, 3) as var_95,
  ROUND((-20 - (RANDOM() * 15))::numeric, 3) as cvar_5,
  ROUND((15 + (RANDOM() * 20))::numeric, 3) as cvar_95
FROM crypto_risk
ORDER BY var_5 ASC

WITH stock_var AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    COALESCE(s.company_name, s.symbol) as name,
    (-8 - (RANDOM() * 4)) as var_5,
    (5 + (RANDOM() * 7)) as var_95,
    (8 + (RANDOM() * 12)) as var_99
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND(var_5::numeric, 3) as var_5,
  ROUND(var_95::numeric, 3) as var_95,
  ROUND(var_99::numeric, 3) as var_99
FROM stock_var
ORDER BY var_5 ASC

WITH stock_cvar AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    COALESCE(s.company_name, s.symbol) as name,
    (-12 - (RANDOM() * 8)) as cvar_5,
    (8 + (RANDOM() * 12)) as cvar_95,
    (15 + (RANDOM() * 20)) as cvar_99
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND(cvar_5::numeric, 3) as cvar_5,
  ROUND(cvar_95::numeric, 3) as cvar_95,
  ROUND(cvar_99::numeric, 3) as cvar_99
FROM stock_cvar
ORDER BY cvar_5 ASC

panels.title: VaR/CVaR Analysis - Sector ETFs (All Confidence Levels)

targets.rawSql:
WITH sector_etfs AS (
  SELECT symbol, name, category FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('XLK', 'Technology Select Sector SPDR', 'Technology'),
    ('VGT', 'Vanguard Information Technology', 'Technology'),
    ('XLF', 'Financial Select Sector SPDR', 'Financials'),
    ('VFH', 'Vanguard Financials', 'Financials'),
    ('XLE', 'Energy Select Sector SPDR', 'Energy'),
    ('VDE', 'Vanguard Energy', 'Energy'),
    ('XLI', 'Industrial Select Sector SPDR', 'Industrials'),
    ('VIS', 'Vanguard Industrials', 'Industrials'),
    ('XLV', 'Health Care Select Sector SPDR', 'Healthcare'),
    ('VHT', 'Vanguard Health Care', 'Healthcare'),
    ('XLB', 'Materials Select Sector SPDR', 'Materials'),
    ('VAW', 'Vanguard Materials', 'Materials'),
    ('XLY', 'Consumer Discretionary SPDR', 'Consumer Disc'),
    ('VCR', 'Vanguard Consumer Discretionary', 'Consumer Disc'),
    ('XLP', 'Consumer Staples SPDR', 'Consumer Staples'),
    ('VDC', 'Vanguard Consumer Staples', 'Consumer Staples'),
    ('XLC', 'Communication Services SPDR', 'Communications'),
    ('VOX', 'Vanguard Communication Services', 'Communications'),
    ('XLRE', 'Real Estate Select Sector SPDR', 'Real Estate'),
    ('VNQ', 'Vanguard Real Estate', 'Real Estate'),
    ('XLU', 'Utilities Select Sector SPDR', 'Utilities'),
    ('VPU', 'Vanguard Utilities', 'Utilities')
  ) AS t(symbol, name, category)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  category,
  ROUND((-8 - (RANDOM() * 4))::numeric, 3) as var_5,
  ROUND((5 + (RANDOM() * 7))::numeric, 3) as var_95,
  ROUND((8 + (RANDOM() * 12))::numeric, 3) as var_99,
  ROUND((-10 - (RANDOM() * 6))::numeric, 3) as cvar_5,
  ROUND((8 + (RANDOM() * 10))::numeric, 3) as cvar_95,
  ROUND((12 + (RANDOM() * 18))::numeric, 3) as cvar_99
FROM sector_etfs
ORDER BY var_5 ASC
LIMIT 25

WITH commodity_returns AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('GOLD', 'Gold'),
    ('SILVER', 'Silver'),
    ('WTI', 'Crude Oil WTI'),
    ('BRENT', 'Brent Crude'),
    ('COPPER', 'Copper'),
    ('NATGAS', 'Natural Gas'),
    ('WHEAT', 'Wheat'),
    ('CORN', 'Corn'),
    ('SOYBEAN', 'Soybeans'),
    ('COFFEE', 'Coffee')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-8 + (RANDOM() * 20))::numeric, 2) as return_rate,
  ROUND((RANDOM() * 100)::numeric, 0) as volatility
FROM commodity_returns
ORDER BY return_rate DESC

WITH forex_returns AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('EURUSD', 'Euro/USD'),
    ('GBPUSD', 'British Pound/USD'),
    ('USDJPY', 'USD/Japanese Yen'),
    ('USDCHF', 'USD/Swiss Franc'),
    ('AUDUSD', 'Australian Dollar/USD'),
    ('USDCAD', 'USD/Canadian Dollar'),
    ('NZDUSD', 'New Zealand Dollar/USD'),
    ('EURGBP', 'Euro/British Pound'),
    ('EURJPY', 'Euro/Japanese Yen'),
    ('GBPJPY', 'British Pound/Japanese Yen')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-3 + (RANDOM() * 8))::numeric, 2) as return_rate,
  ROUND((RANDOM() * 50)::numeric, 0) as volatility
FROM forex_returns
ORDER BY return_rate DESC

WITH correlation_matrix AS (
  SELECT 'AAPL' as asset1, 'MSFT' as asset2, 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2) as correlation, 'Stock' as category
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'GOOGL', 0.65 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'TSLA', 0.45 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MSFT', 'GOOGL', 0.80 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'ETH', 0.85 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'ADA', 0.70 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'SOL', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'ETH', 'ADA', 0.80 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'GBPUSD', 0.70 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'USDJPY', -0.30 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'USDCHF', -0.85 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GBPUSD', 'USDJPY', -0.25 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'SILVER', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'WTI', -0.15 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'COPPER', 0.35 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SILVER', 'WTI', -0.10 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'BTC', 0.25 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Cross-Asset'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'AAPL', -0.05 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Cross-Asset'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'AAPL', 0.15 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Cross-Asset'
)
SELECT 
  asset1,
  asset2,
  category,
  ROUND(correlation::numeric, 3) as correlation
FROM correlation_matrix
ORDER BY category, asset1, asset2

WITH options_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    100 + (RANDOM() * 100) as underlying_price
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.symbol IN ('AAPL', 'GOOGL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'NVDA', 'NFLX')
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  ROUND(underlying_price::numeric, 2) as underlying,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 1.05)::numeric, 2) as call_strike,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.95)::numeric, 2) as put_strike,
  ROUND((15 + RANDOM() * 25)::numeric, 1) as iv,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.02 + RANDOM() * 5)::numeric, 2) as call_price,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.02 + RANDOM() * 5)::numeric, 2) as put_price
FROM options_simulation
ORDER BY symbol

WITH portfolio_pnl AS (
  SELECT position_name, sector FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('Tech Portfolio', 'Technology'),
    ('Finance Holdings', 'Financials'),
    ('Energy Investments', 'Energy'),
    ('Healthcare Fund', 'Healthcare'),
    ('Consumer Goods', 'Consumer'),
    ('Real Estate Fund', 'Real Estate'),
    ('Crypto Portfolio', 'Cryptocurrency'),
    ('Commodity Fund', 'Commodities'),
    ('International Equity', 'Global'),
    ('Bond Portfolio', 'Fixed Income')
  ) AS t(position_name, sector)
)
SELECT 
  position_name,
  sector,
  ROUND((50000 + (RANDOM() * 200000))::numeric, 0) as market_value,
  ROUND((-15 + (RANDOM() * 35))::numeric, 2) as pnl_pct,
  ROUND(((-15 + (RANDOM() * 35)) * (50000 + (RANDOM() * 200000)) / 100)::numeric, 0) as pnl_usd
FROM portfolio_pnl
ORDER BY pnl_pct DESC

WITH pe_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    s.sector,
    15 + (RANDOM() * 25) as pe_ratio
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 100000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  company_name as name,
  sector,
  ROUND(pe_ratio::numeric, 2) as pe_ratio
FROM pe_simulation
ORDER BY pe_ratio DESC

WITH market_news AS (
  SELECT symbol, headline, sentiment FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('AAPL', 'Apple Reports Strong Q4 Earnings', 'Positive'),
    ('TSLA', 'Tesla Cybertruck Production Ramps Up', 'Positive'),
    ('MSFT', 'Microsoft Azure Revenue Beats Expectations', 'Positive'),
    ('GOOGL', 'Google Faces New Antitrust Challenges', 'Negative'),
    ('AMZN', 'Amazon Prime Membership Growth Slows', 'Negative'),
    ('META', 'Meta Launches New VR Product Line', 'Positive'),
    ('NVDA', 'NVIDIA AI Chip Demand Remains Strong', 'Positive'),
    ('SPY', 'S&P 500 Reaches New All-Time High', 'Positive'),
    ('QQQ', 'Tech Sector Outperforms Market Average', 'Positive'),
    ('VIX', 'Market Volatility Decreases to Normal Levels', 'Positive')
  ) AS t(symbol, headline, sentiment)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  headline,
  sentiment,
  CASE 
    WHEN sentiment = 'Positive' THEN ROUND((0.3 + RANDOM() * 0.6)::numeric, 2)
    WHEN sentiment = 'Negative' THEN ROUND((-0.7 + RANDOM() * 0.6)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND((-0.1 + RANDOM() * 0.2)::numeric, 2)
  END as sentiment_score,
  NOW() - (RANDOM() * INTERVAL '6 hours') as news_time
FROM market_news
ORDER BY news_time DESC

WITH dividend_stocks AS (
  SELECT symbol, company_name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('T', 'AT&T Inc'),
    ('VZ', 'Verizon Communications'),
    ('XOM', 'Exxon Mobil'),
    ('CVX', 'Chevron Corporation'),
    ('KO', 'The Coca-Cola Company'),
    ('PFE', 'Pfizer Inc'),
    ('JNJ', 'Johnson & Johnson'),
    ('PG', 'Procter & Gamble'),
    ('WMT', 'Walmart Inc'),
    ('IBM', 'International Business Machines')
  ) AS t(symbol, company_name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  company_name as name,
  ROUND((3 + (RANDOM() * 5))::numeric, 2) as dividend_yield,
  ROUND((200 + (RANDOM() * 300))::numeric, 2) as current_price
FROM dividend_stocks
ORDER BY dividend_yield DESC

WITH vix_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as trade_time
),
vix_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_time,
    20 + (RANDOM() * 15) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_time) / 3600) * 3 as vix_value
  FROM vix_simulation
)
SELECT 
  trade_time as time,
  'VIX' as metric,
  vix_value as value
FROM vix_values
ORDER BY trade_time

WITH breadth_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as trade_time
),
breadth_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_time,
    15 + (RANDOM() * 25) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_time) / 7200) * 5 as advance_decline_ratio,
    45 + (RANDOM() * 20) + COS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_time) / 5400) * 8 as new_highs_lows
  FROM breadth_simulation
)
SELECT 
  trade_time as time,
  'Advance/Decline Ratio' as metric,
  advance_decline_ratio as value
FROM breadth_values
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  trade_time as time,
  'New Highs/Lows' as metric,
  new_highs_lows as value
FROM breadth_values
ORDER BY time

WITH portfolio_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 day'
    ) as trade_date
),
portfolio_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_date,
    1000000 * (1 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_date) / 86400) * 0.05 + (RANDOM() - 0.5) * 0.02) as portfolio_value
  FROM portfolio_simulation
),
running_max AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_date,
    portfolio_value,
    MAX(portfolio_value) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) as running_maximum
  FROM portfolio_values
)
SELECT 
  trade_date as time,
  'Drawdown' as metric,
  (portfolio_value - running_maximum) / running_maximum * 100 as value
FROM running_max
ORDER BY trade_date
